alzio.detect 0.0.0.9000
  • Reference
  • Articles
    • Introduction to alzio.detect

    Compute demographically-adjusted Z-scores for cognitive tests

    compute_zscore.Rd

    Converts raw cognitive test scores to Z-scores adjusted for age, education, and sex using regression-based normative methods.

    compute_zscore(raw_scores, test, age, education, sex, reference = "internal")

    Arguments

    raw_scores

    A numeric vector of raw test scores.

    test

    Name of the cognitive test. One of "mmse", "moca", "adas_cog13", or "cdr_sb".

    age

    Numeric vector of ages in years.

    education

    Numeric vector of education in years.

    sex

    Factor or character vector with levels "male" and "female" (or "M" / "F").

    reference

    Which reference norms to use. When "internal" (default), the sample mean and SD are used. "external" is reserved for future built-in reference tables.

    Value

    A numeric vector of Z-scores.

    Contents

    Developed by Dany Mukesha.
